## Conditions.ConditionCollector.add() method

Adds a condition to the collector given a [condition declaration](./ts-res.conditions.iconditiondecl.md)<!-- -->. If an identical condition is already in the collector, the existing condition is returned.

**Signature:**

```typescript
add(decl: unknown): DetailedResult<Condition, Collections.CollectorResultDetail>;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

decl


</td><td>

unknown


</td><td>

The condition to add to the collector, supplied as an `unknown` value but expected to be a well-formed [IConditionDecl](./ts-res.conditions.iconditiondecl.md)<!-- -->.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
**Returns:**

DetailedResult&lt;[Condition](./ts-res.conditions.condition.md)<!-- -->, Collections.CollectorResultDetail&gt;

Returns `DetailedSuccess` with the condition and detail `added` if it was added or detail `exists` if the item was already in the map. Returns `DetailedFailure` with an error message and appropriate detail if the condition could not be added.
